headline: Carrier Global (CARR) Stock After 30% YTD Gain Is The Price Still Reasonable
summary: If you are wondering whether Carrier Global's current share price lines up with its underlying value, you are not alone. This article focuses squarely on that question. The stock recently closed at US$69.91, with returns of 4.1% over the past week, 6.6% over the past month, 30.6% year to date and a slight decline of 0.4% over the last year. These movements may have shifted how investors think about its potential and risk. Recent coverage has highlighted Carrier Global in the context of...
